meaning: vt.(为乐器)调音,使合调,使相合
examples: Attune to us if we cross your path or invade you home.
Attune unto us through the heart chakra and human hologram.
You can attune unto our kingdoms to learn the Language of ONE.
An innate difference between men and women is that women are instinctively more attune to relationships than men are.
The industry has helped attune women to signs of aging skin, and now they look to products for a solution, Mr. Rubin says.
